{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01Bydxs6uYNdwwLSd6UCJMMq","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The compressed GitHub MCP server available in this environment does not include tools for GitHub Actions workflow runs. The tools it provides cover issues, pull requests, commits, branches, releases, code search, and repository management — but not Actions (`list_workflow_runs`, `get_workflow_run_jobs`, etc.).\n\nTo accomplish this task you would need one of:\n\n- A GitHub MCP server that includes Actions/workflow run tools (e.g., the official `@modelcontextprotocol/server-github` with Actions support)\n- The `gh` CLI (`gh run list` / `gh run view --job`) — which is explicitly disallowed by this project's `CLAUDE.md`\n\n**Available tools in this environment** (none cover workflow runs):\n`list_issues`, `list_pull_requests`, `list_commits`, `get_commit`, `list_branches`, `list_releases`, `search_code`, `search_repositories`, `push_files`, `create_pull_request`, and similar repository/code management tools.\n\nIf you can add a GitHub MCP server with Actions support, or relax the `gh` CLI restriction, I can complete this task."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":505,"cache_read_input_tokens":36482,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":505},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"d912ba20-8bd2-4e0e-a50e-ee01b0293b56","uuid":"c819b43b-dbbb-4b52-85fc-81272f28c4cc"}
